holdings.infoBox: ECH is an equity ETF with a total of 31 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sociedad Química y Minera de Chile stock at 15.31%, Banco de Chile at 11.34%, LATAM Airlines Group at 11.03%, Falabella at 4.97%, and Banco Santander-Chile at 4.60%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Chile ETF (ECH) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Chile IMI 25-50 index, a market-cap-weighted index of Chilean firms that covers roughly 99% of the free float-adjusted market-capitalization. ECH was launched on Nov 12, 2007 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: ETF Edge: A fundamental shift in international investing as geopolitical concerns swing markets
data.text: Political and economic tensions, domestic headlines, currency flows and the Federal Reserve have all combined to reignite the “United States vs. international” investing debate.

data.title: These Single-Country ETFs Can Hedge Your U.S. Risk
data.text: Single-country funds can reduce overall portfolio risk by acting differently than the S&P 500, offering diversification beyond broad international indexes.

data.text: For the most part, stocks around the world have taken a beating this year. But there's one corner of the global market that's bucking that trend: Chile.
